offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual preparation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the generation of monthly financial statements instead of manual preparation.
problem: Timely generation of financial statements for accounting purposes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Share in community forums for Etsy sellers
try_it: Let users try monthly financial statement generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing financial data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps required in onboarding process
